testcase.name: Buy Product Scenarios › Should successfully buy featured product @ui @product

failure.message: buyProduct.spec.ts:16:7 Should successfully buy featured product @ui @product

testcase.failure:
[ui] › frontend/specs/buyProduct.spec.ts:16:7 › Buy Product Scenarios › Should successfully buy featured product @ui @product
Error: Timed out 5000ms waiting for expect(locator).toHaveTitle(expected)
Locator: locator(':root') Expected string: "Thank you for your purchase! - Monkey Bakery - Checkout" Received string: "Checkout - Monkey Bakery" Call log: - expect.toHaveTitle with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator(':root') 9 × locator resolved to <html lang="en" dir="ltr">…</html> - unexpected value "Checkout - Monkey Bakery"
at frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmationPage.ts:126
124 | productDetails: productDetails 125 | ): Promise<void> { > 126 | await expect(this.page).toHaveTitle( | ^ 127 | pageTitles.orderConfirmationPage.default 128 | ); 129 | await this.validateTitle(userDetails); at OrderConfirmationPage.validateOrderConfirmationPage (/Users/isabelaalborghetti/Documents/Home-Assessment-Challenge/tests/frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmationPage.ts:126:29) at /Users/isabelaalborghetti/Documents/Home-Assessment-Challenge/tests/frontend/specs/buyProduct.spec.ts:25:33

testcase.name: Buy Product Scenarios › Should unsuccessfully buy product @ui @product
testcase.system-out: Successfully navigated to the checkout page for: Monkey Bread Baking Kit Email filled with: Gilberto_Douglas@gmail.com Delivery form filled with: { name: [32m'Kyra'[39m, lastName: [32m'Lindgren'[39m, postalCode: [32m'79187'[39m, address: [32m'54938 Aylin Knolls'[39m, city: [32m'Colbyhaven'[39m, optionalAddress: [90mundefined[39m, saveInfo: [90mundefined[39m, country: [32m'United States'[39m, state: [32m'TX'[39m } Shipping price: 10.00 Shipping method: Standard Shipping Payment form filled Unsuccessful checkout process completed

testcase.name: Cart Scenarios › Should successfully add product to cart via search @ui @cart
testcase.system-out: Successfully searched for: chocolate Product details validated Successfully validated the cart notification for: Chocolate Swirl Monkey Bread Loaf Successfully navigated to the cart page via cart notification Successfully validated: Chocolate Swirl Monkey Bread Loaf in cart Successfully validated estimated total: $14.99

testcase.name: Cart Scenarios › Should successfully edit cart @ui @cart
testcase.system-out: Product details validated Successfully validated the cart notification for: Banana Nut Monkey Muffins Successfully navigated to the cart page via cart notification Successfully validated: Banana Nut Monkey Muffins in cart Successfully validated estimated total: $8.99 Successfully added 1 Banana Nut Monkey Muffins to cart. New quantity: 2, expected total price: $17.98 Successfully removed 1 Banana Nut Monkey Muffins from cart. New quantity: 1, expected total price: $8.99

testcase.name: Catalog Scenarios › Should successfully validate catalog page @ui @catalog
testcase.system-out: Successfully navigated to the Catalog page

testcase.name: Contest Type API Tests › Should return valid contest type data for a random contest type @api @contest
testcase.system-out: Successfully validated the structure of the contest type data

testcase.name: /location Endpoint Scenarios › Should return a valid location for a given ID or name @api @location
